title: Logistics Assistant
description:
Are you looking to power the next leap in the exciting world of advanced electronics? Do you want to help solve problems that drive success in the rapidly evolving technology and connectivity landscape? Then bring your problem-solving, passion, and creativity to help us power the next leap in electronics.

At Qnity, we’re more than a global leader in materials and solutions for advanced electronics and high-tech industries – we’re a tight-knit team that is motivated by new possibilities, and always up for a challenge. All our dedicated teams contribute to making cutting-edge technology possible. We value forward-thinking challengers, boundary-pushers, and diverse perspectives across all our departments, because we know we play a critical role in the world enabling faster progress for all. Learn how you can start or jumpstart your career with us.

Key Responsibilities

Exception Resolution


Own all invoices routed to the NA Road/ Exception bucket for SAP (P23/P80).
Review, analyze, and resolve exceptions; coordinate with Cass to clear or update invoice status.
Obtain contracted rates from Buyers when invoices do not match existing rates for upload into Cassport.
Manage daily spot quote handling—manual Cassport entry or sending templates to Cass.


Escalation & Approvals


Trigger the escalation process when an invoice cannot be resolved at the first level.
Secure business approval to accept or reject invoices and document all decisions.


Compliance & SOP Adherence


Follow the LMP Freight Payment SOP, INCO terms, and expedited payment protocols.


Process & Documentation


Develop internal processes, procedures, and exception-handler metrics.
Conduct periodic reviews to ensure continuous improvement and compliance.


Additional Duties


Perform other responsibilities as assigned by the Supervisor.


Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Finance, or related field (or equivalent experience).
3–5 years in freight payment, transportation operations, or AP exception handling.
Experience with Cass/Cassport and SAP (P23/P80) preferred.
Strong understanding of INCO terms and freight rating structures.


Skills & Competencies


Analytical, detail-oriented, and process disciplined.
Strong stakeholder management across carriers, Cass, Buyers, and business teams.
Excellent documentation, prioritization, and problem-solving abilities.
Proficient in Cassport, SAP, Excel, and standard workflow tools.


Join our Talent Community to stay connected with us!

description:

Position Summary

Senior Analyst – Client Account Management (CAM)

If you would like to be in a role that leverages your strengths to support Deloitte’s important clients, this could be the role for you. Work you’ll do

As a Client Account Management (CAM) professional you will help Deloitte’s account leaders and other internal stakeholders to deliver account support which will help in strengthening relationships and expanding our services footprint at our clients.

Your responsibilities will include:


Independently handle end-to end project management including stakeholder communications, pipeline management, project prioritization and project delivery

title: GMF-Reporting & Project Management - Senior Analyst
description:
Position Summary

Reporting and PMO– Senior Analyst

Key Responsibilities:

Reporting, Analytics & Data Management


Ensure the accuracy, completeness, and relevance of all data and reporting outputs, applying robust testing and quality assurance processes.
Analyze large data sets to identify trends, derive insights, and support executive-level business decisions.
Monitor and maintain the functionality and accuracy of Excel VBA scripts and excel dashboards, ensuring solutions remain up to date and operational.


Programme and Business Support


Consolidate data, resolve inconsistencies, add missing info from GPT, Swift, AO, DEAL, IFA Database
Request monthly GDN reports from non-Swift Delivery Centers
Conduct ad-hoc strategic analyses and discrete program management activities as needed by business leaders or stakeholders.
Drive process improvement by identifying operational gaps, proposing enhancements, and monitoring the impact of implemented changes.


Stakeholder Engagement & Communication


Develop executive-level reports and presentations, distilling complex data into meaningful insights and themes tailored for senior stakeholders.
Prepare content for, and support, meetings with internal and external stakeholders, ensuring effective action-tracking and summary follow-ups.
Monitor shared mailboxes, ensuring timely acknowledgement and response to inquiries in line with operational service agreements.


Continuous Learning & Adaptability


Upskill proactively to adopt new tools, technologies, and methodologies in response to evolving team and organizational needs.
Stay current with organizational strategy and external market trends to ensure all analytics and reporting remain relevant and forward-looking.


Skills and Professional Experience:

Analytical & Problem-Solving


Advanced analytical skills; expert at working with data, identifying trends, troubleshooting, and communicating insights.
Proven ability to conduct root-cause analysis and drive service improvement.


Organization & Adaptability


Highly organized, with demonstrated ability to manage competing priorities, meet tight deadlines, and adapt to evolving business needs.
Flexible approach, able to juggle multiple projects and deliver high-quality results.


Business Acumen


Understanding of business drivers, financial principles, and program management.


Communication & Stakeholder Management


Strong written and verbal communication skills; able to present information clearly to senior leadership and adapt messaging to diverse stakeholder audiences.
Experience in developing executive-level presentations and summarizing complex topics concisely.


Experience


Track record of managing multiple priorities, reporting on concurrent workstreams, and thriving in fast-paced environments.
Comfortable working independently, taking accountability for tasks, and incorporating feedback for process enhancement.


About the Team:

Qualifications:

Education:


Master’s degree or equivalent required.


Interpersonal Skills


Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
Highly numerate and analytical, with a proactive approach to solving business challenges.
Demonstrated ability to use initiative and excel under pressure, especially with conflicting and tight deadlines.
Adaptable, with the ability to pivot quickly in response to shifting business priorities.
Relationship-builder, keen to share new ideas and collaborate.
Detail-oriented, takes ownership, makes informed decisions, and executes effectively.
Proven team player, capable of working with virtual and distributed teams.


Professional Experience


At least 4+ years’ demonstrated expertise working with data; skilled in leveraging analytics for business value.
Proven track record of applying technology to business challenges and presenting insights to varied audiences.
Experience in handling large projects
Entrepreneurial mindset with a positive, solutions-oriented attitude.
Ability to elicit client requirements and design/implement effective reporting solutions.

title: IT Scrum Master
description:
Looking for: IT Scrum Master

Job Type: Full time

Location: Hyderabad, India (Hybrid)

Status: Accepting Candidates

Number of positions:1

Description:

A Global Infrastructure Organization, including Information Technology, provides IT solutions and support services with a flexible, scalable model. As a member of this high performance, progressive team, you will play a key role as a member of staff managing IT Scrum team to help meet its growth and profitability goals.




Primary Accountabilities:

IT Scrum Master: Leads IT development scrum teams in providing IT solutions to complex, high-impact business problems from requirements through implementation of integrated solutions and/or infrastructure services. Has ongoing accountability for all processes, resources, and deliverables related to online development. Oversee the team of internal and external IT resources as they plan, track and execute development from start to completion.

• Define and manage scope, goals, and deliverables aligned with business objectives.

• Develop and maintain plans, schedules, milestones, and budgets.

• Facilitate Agile ceremonies including daily stand-ups, sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives.

• Coordinate cross-functional teams and stakeholders to ensure alignment and collaboration.

• Coach and guide Agile teams on Scrum/Agile principles, frameworks, and practices.

• Support the Product Owner with backlog refinement, prioritization, and user story clarity.

• Identify, log, and manage risks and issues throughout the project lifecycle.

• Remove impediments that block team progress and delivery.

• Monitor team velocity, burn-down charts, and other Agile metrics to track performance and identify improvement areas.

• Communicate project and sprint status to leadership and stakeholders clearly and regularly.

• Promote a culture of continuous improvement, psychological safety, and high performance within the team.

• Ensure that deliverables meet quality standards, scope, and timeline expectations.

• Manage stakeholder expectations, communication plans, and engagement strategies.

• Lead governance activities, including status reports, steering committee meetings, and project reviews.

• Ensure compliance with organizational processes, procurement policies, and vendor management (if applicable).

• Adapt processes and practices based on team maturity, organizational needs, and development complexity.




Skills & Qualifications:

• Strong understanding of Agile frameworks (Scrum, SAFe, or Kanban) and traditional project management (Waterfall, Hybrid)

• Understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)

• Experience with project planning, scheduling, and budget management

• Familiarity with Agile metrics (velocity, burn-down charts, cumulative flow diagrams)

• Sprint planning, backlog grooming, and release management skills

• Experience managing scrum teams across multiple Web/ERP/CRM/CIAM/Middleware platforms preferred

• Extensive experience working as part of a global, virtual team in a multinational company

• Excellent facilitation skills for stand-ups, retrospectives, and stakeholder meetings

• Conflict resolution and team coaching skills

• Strong verbal and written communication across technical and non-technical audiences

• Skilled in status reporting, dashboard creation, and executive updates

• Proficient in identifying and managing project risks, issues, and scope changes

• Proficiency in tools like JIRA, Confluence, Azure DevOps, Trello, or equivalent Agile tools

• Experience with MS Project, Smartsheet, or other tools

• Education/Experience: Bachelors or University Degree or equivalent.Typically 8+ years relevant experience for entry to this level. Requires specialized depth and/or breadth of expertise in job.

title: Customer Success Operations Coordinator
description:
Forbes Advisor is a new initiative for consumers under the Forbes Marketplace umbrella that provides journalist- and expert-written insights, news and reviews on all things personal finance, health, business, and everyday life decisions. We do this by providing consumers with the knowledge and research they need to make informed decisions they can feel confident in, so they can get back to doing the things they care about most. We are an experienced team of industry experts dedicated to helping readers make smart decisions and choose the right products with ease. Marketplace boasts decades of experience across dozens of geographies and teams, including Content, SEO, Business Intelligence, Finance, HR, Marketing, Production, Technology and Sales. We bring rich industry knowledge to Marketplace’s global coverage of consumer credit, debt, health, home improvement, banking, investing, credit cards, small business, education, insurance, loans, real estate and travel.



Forbes Advisor is looking for a full-time Customer Success Operations Coordinator. This is an

entry-level business development role, reporting to the Customer Success Manager and supporting

the wider commercial teams in identifying, executing, and optimizing campaigns across our Health

portfolio and partners.

If you're looking for challenges and opportunities similar to those of a startup, with the benefits of a

seasoned and successful company, then read on:





Job Description



Responsibilities:

● Manage and update internal databases and tracking tools that are used by the wider Customer Success team

● Work with Production team to create our advertiser’s promotional placements to be published on Forbes Health properties

● Support Customer Success Manager in onboarding and executing new customer initiatives

● Manage collection of creative assets, tracking, and ad verification from clients/agency contacts and coordinate with Customer Success Manager

● Audit existing partner placements to optimize performance and monetization and to drive revenue growth

● Project manage and coordinate with internal teams on all necessary elements for campaign execution

● Work with internal teams on billing reconciliation and revenue tracking/forecasting







Requirements:

● Customer experience advocate with an entrepreneurial spirit who thrives in a team, goal-oriented environment

● 2+ years of proven digital advertising and/or affiliate marketing experience

● Familiarity with various affiliate platforms such as Impact, ShareASale, CJ, Rakuten, a plus

● Exceptional communication and organizational skills

● Ability to manage stress well and juggle multiple account challenges at once

● Extremely detail oriented

● Fluent in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint

● Experience in WordPress, a plus



Perks:



Day off on the 3rd Friday of every month (one long weekend each month)
Monthly Wellness Reimbursement Program to promote health well-being
Monthly Office Commutation Reimbursement Program
Paid paternity and maternity leaves







Qualifications



Any Full time degree

title: Seller Operations Executive
description:
About noon

We’re building an ecosystem of digital products and services that power everyday life across the Middle East—fast, scalable, and deeply customer-centric. Our mission is to deliver to every door every day. We want to redefine what technology can do in this region, and we’re looking for a Seller Operator (Operations) who can help us move even faster.




Our mission: Ring every doorbell, every day.




What you'll do:

At noon, you’ll work alongside some of the fastest, smartest, and most driven people in the region. Our teams are young, ambitious, and relentlessly execution-focused, working on high-impact initiatives every day.




Overview of the role:

Looking for a dynamic Operations Associate to support forward logistics, reverse operations, and seller onboarding. The role involves managing order flows, handling returns, and assisting sellers to ensure smooth marketplace operations. Ideal for candidates who are detail-oriented, eager to learn, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.




What you'll need:

1. Forward Operations:

Assist in the day-to-day execution of forward logistics operations.
Support order processing activities to ensure accuracy and efficiency.
Collaborate with team members to maintain optimal inventory levels and smooth shipment processes.
Learn and contribute to the optimization of supply chain operations.




2. Reverse Operations:

Support the management of the reverse logistics process, including returns and exchanges.
Assist in the implementation of effective return policies to minimize costs and enhance customer satisfaction.
Analyze return trends under guidance to provide insights for process improvement.
Work closely with the team to address and resolve return-related inquiries.




3. Seller Onboarding:

Contribute to the onboarding process for new sellers onto our platform.
Assist in maintaining up-to-date onboarding documentation for sellers.
Provide support in training sessions for sellers and act as a point of contact for basic inquiries.
Collaborate with team members to streamline and enhance the overall onboarding process.




Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or equivalent practical experience.
Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Entry-level candidates or 1-3 years of relevant work experience. -Strong organizational skills with attention to detail. -Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment. -Eagerness to learn and contribute to process improvement.




Who will excel?

We’re looking for candidates who thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic start-up environment.
We’re searching for problem solvers, people who operate with a bias for action and have a deep understanding of the importance of resourcefulness over reliance.
Candor is our only default. Demanding unequivocal high standards should be non-negotiable because quality matters.
We want people who are radically candid, cohorts who commit to settling for nothing but the best - in hiring, in accepting work from colleagues, and in your own work. Ours is not an easy mission, but it is a meaningful one.
Every hire must actively raise the bar of talent in the company to help us reach our vision.

title: Campus Recruiter
description:
Campus Recruiter will be responsible for building strong relationships with universities and colleges, managing campus hiring for various programs, and attracting top entry-level talent to meet organizational needs for Pune region. This role involves planning, executing, and optimizing campus recruitment strategies to ensure a strong talent pipeline.




Areas of Responsibility:

Campus Engagement:

Develop and maintain relationships with training and placement team, career development centre of institute, HOD and student organizations.
Design and execution of Pre & Post Offer Student Engagement strategy.
Strategize and contribute to effective branding initiatives at institutes within the region.
Representing the company at campus events, career fairs, and networking sessions.
Promote "TCS Campus Commune" as the leading social media learning platform.

Recruitment Process:

Understanding the hiring requirements from different units and coordinating with the CTAG to get the requirements fulfilled.
Manage end-to-end campus hiring, including branding and promotion at various channels of social media, planning the drive, interview closure, document validation and offer release.
Coordinate assessment centers, technical evaluations, publishing the dashboards with internal and external stakeholders.
Engaging BU leadership for driving niche skill hiring in the region
Organizing and Promoting participation for TCS Flagship contests like EngiNX, Codevita, EnQuode, HackQuest, Inframind, HumAIn etc.
Connect with senior leadership in the branch to ensure an effective pipeline of speakers at various events.
Staying updated about hiring trends and best practices and ensuring the process is being automated and made efficient with periodical intervals. Partnering with the team to design, refine, and implement innovative recruitment strategies and processes.
Work closely with managers to gain a comprehensive understanding of the company’s hiring needs for every role, and to meet competitive hiring goals and expectations.
Ensuring TAT and SLA are followed while submitting the reports, dashboards and while resolving queries for candidates or placement officers.

title: Investment Banking Analyst
description:
Investment Banking Analyst (Graduates and Experienced Hires) - Mumbai







Our Client

Our subsidiary CF Invest, is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on positions in the investment sector.




We are recruiting on behalf of our client, one of the bulge bracket bank and pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices on an ongoing basis through the first half of each year, with the view of onboarding immediately or upon graduation.




Our client is looking for two professionals to join their Investment Banking team in Mumbai as an Analyst and use their skills and ideas to make an impact on the success of the bank. You will either be placed in their FIG, TMT or Energy Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry including but not limited to Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications




Graduate – Analyst

Bachelor’s degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations
We consider any degree or subject and although your grade indicates your ability to absorb data and apply it, your degree grade does not influence your chance of applying to us and being interviewed.







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

Analyst annual base salary of 125,000 and up to 150,000 United States Dollars depending on experience. Your salary will be paid in Indian Rupees and bonus in USD
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers
Relocation is provided by the company

title: Guest Relations Executive (Management Training Program)
description:
Join Everest Base Camp Mussoorie:

Management Trainee Program

YOUR OPPORTUNITY TO LEAD THE NEXT CHAPTER

Are you a supervisory professional ready to level up? Do you have the hunger to grow, the

drive to lead, and the vision to shape the future of an exciting hospitality venture? Everest

Base Camp (EBC), luxury camping resort in the heart of Mussoorie, is looking for

two exceptional Management Trainees to join our rapidly expanding team.




ABOUT EVEREST BASE CAMP

Nestled in the untouched landscape near Sir George Everest House, EBC Mussoorie is a

premium luxury glamping resort redening hospitality in the Himalayan foothills. With

our iconic plush tents, world-class amenities, curated experiences, and our signature Park

Cafe, we're creating magical memories for guests from across India and beyond.

We're growing fast. And we need emerging leaders like you to grow with us.




THE ROLE: MANAGEMENT TRAINEE

This is not a typical entry-level position. This is a fast-track leadership development

program for supervisory professionals who are ready to evolve.




What You'll Do:

Lead Cross-Functional Operations: Oversee and coordinate front oce, guest

relations, F&B operations, and housekeeping functions

Guest Experience Excellence: Ensure every guest interaction reects our

commitment to premium hospitality and creates unforgettable moments

Team Development & Mentorship: Coach and develop sta, building high-

performance teams while learning modern leadership practices

Operational Eciency: Implement best practices, optimize processes, and

contribute to P&L management

Strategic Growth Initiatives: Participate in property expansion plans and help

establish systems for our upcoming campus growth

Training & Quality Assurance: Conduct training sessions, maintain service

standards, and drive continuous improvement

Stakeholder Management: Build relationships with guests, vendors, and internal

teams to ensure seamless operations.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Your Background:

2-5+ years of supervisory/management experience in hospitality (Front Oce

Supervisor , Guest Relations Supervisor , F&B Supervisor , or similar roles)

Proven track record of leading teams and delivering exceptional guest experiences

Strong operational and problem-solving skills with attention to detail

Understanding of hospitality management fundamentals

Your Qualities:

Ambitious: Hungry to grow into a leadership role and make an impact

Adaptable: Thriving in a fast-paced, growing property with evolving challenges

Guest-Centric: Passionate about creating memorable experiences

Collaborative: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Proactive: Willing to take ownership and drive initiatives

Resilient: Ready for the dynamic nature of hospitality operations

Nice-to-Have:

Bachelor's degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related

eld

Experience with hotel management systems (PMS) and POS.




WHY JOIN EBC ?

Fast-Track Leadership Development

You won't just manage—you'll learn to lead. Our structured mentorship program

accelerates your growth into future leadership roles

Real responsibility in a real, growing property with direct visibility to senior

management

Opportunities to shape operations and contribute to strategic decisions

Be part of something exciting and new: EBC is in its growth phase with expansion

plans and thrilling possibilities

Join an Up-and-Coming Property

Build the culture and systems from the ground up—your input shapes our future

Work in a stunning natural setting that inspires guests and energizes teams




Comprehensive Professional Development

Formal training programs in leadership, operations, and guests and energizes teams

Comprehensive Professional Development

Formal training programs in leadership, operations, and guest service excellence

Mentorship from experienced hospitality professionals

Exposure to multi-property operations and best practices

Clear pathway to Rooms Division Manager and F&B Manager roles.




THE MUSSOORIE ADVANTAGE

Mussoorie is one of India's most beautiful hill stations. Live and work surrounded by

breathtaking Himalayan views, curated experiences, trekking opportunities, and a vibrant

hospitality ecosystem. This isn't just a job location—it's a lifestyle upgrade.




This isn't a position for everyone. We're looking for supervisors who've realized they have

what it takes to lead. If you're tired of doing the same thing and ready to grow, to challenge

yourself, and to be part of building something exciting in the mountains of Mussoorie—

then Everest Base Camp needs you.

Your next chapter starts here.
